allow: Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.productValidity.count\(\).then\(c => { console.log\('\\''table OK, count:'\\'', c\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('\\''ERROR:'\\'', e.message\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')
